column1: 🔐 🧑 💬 Privacy / air-gap Personal AI companion Data cannot leave your infrastructure. No external The agent needs to learn who you are — your style, API calls, no cloud. preferences, working patterns — and apply that across every session. 1 Holographic — SQLite file on disk, zero network calls, zero external dependencies — 1 Honcho — the only provider built specifically most private by construction for user modeling; three-agent pipeline builds a persistent "dialect" of each user's 2 Hindsight — full local mode, MIT, no cloud preferences required 2 Mem0 — reliable fact recall across sessions; 3 OpenViking — self-host only, no external works well for preference tracking even calls, AGPL — needs Docker + LLM for without dedicated user modeling extraction 🏢 Enterprise / production SSO, audit logs, SLA, on-prem support, no AGPL/copyleft risk in your product. 1 Mem0 — Apache 2.0 (no copyleft), on-prem enterprise tier, SSO, audit logs — covers the enterprise checklist 2 Hindsight — MIT license, strong benchmarks, self-hostable with pay-per-token cloud option
